basic_details.job_title: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare Junior Scientific Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
basic_details.short_information: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare Junior Scientific Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 29 June 2026 on the official website of the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare Junior Scientific Officer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Chemistry or Biochemistry or Pharmacy or Pharmaceutical Chemistry or Pharmacology or Bacteriology or Medicine or Microbiology or Biotechnology
qualification.details: Master's degree in Chemistry or Biochemistry or Pharmacy or Pharmaceutical Chemistry or Pharmacology or Bacteriology or Medicine or Microbiology or Biotechnology of a recognised university or institute with four years experience in drugs testing and standardisation and research.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Ministry of Health and Family Welfare Junior Scientific Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 28-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Ministry of Health and Family Welfare Junior Scientific Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 28-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare Junior Scientific Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Scientific Officer post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Junior Scientific Officer position is 28 August 2026. Candidates are strongly advised to submit their applications well in advance of this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Scientific Officer role?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Junior Scientific Officer position, candidates must possess a Master's degree in Chemistry, Biochemistry, Pharmacy, Pharmaceutical Chemistry, Pharmacology, Bacteriology, Medicine, Microbiology, or Biotechnology from a recognized university or institute.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates applying for the Junior Scientific Officer recruitment. Both General/OBC and SC/ST candidates are exempt from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Scientific Officer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Junior Scientific Officer post will receive a salary in the Pay Level 8 of the 7th CPC, which ranges from Rs. 47,600 to Rs. 1,51,100 per month, along with other allowances as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Scientific Officer post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Junior Scientific Officer post announced by the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare in this recruitment drive. This is a single opening for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Junior Scientific Officer recruitment is offline. Interested candidates need to download the application form, fill it out, and submit it via post or as specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Scientific Officer role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Scientific Officer position involves Document Verification and Cadre Clearance. Candidates will be shortlisted based on these stages.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Junior Scientific Officer position is Deputation. This means the role is for candidates who are already in government service and are being deputed to this post.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare located?
faq.answer: The Ministry of Health and Family Welfare is located in New Delhi, with the pincode 110002. The recruitment notification is specific to this central government department.

faq.question: Q10. Does the notification mention any age relaxation?
faq.answer: The provided data does not explicitly mention any age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for comprehensive information regarding age limits and any applicable relaxations.
